meta.name: Nevil Ghelani
meta.title: AI Architect & Software Research Engineer
meta.summary: Autonomous Systems Architect with a proven track record of industrial innovation and technical leadership in high-stakes Generative AI implementations. Core expertise lies in architecting scalable, resilient software solutions for critical enterprise infrastructure — currently advancing Agentic AI for U.S. infrastructure resilience through robust, hallucination-free agent design. Holder of a utility patent in autonomous robotics and a Master's in Computer Science from Stevens Institute of Technology, with an active Certificate in Agentic AI at Johns Hopkins University.

proposedEndeavor.headline: Advancing Agentic AI for U.S. Infrastructure Resilience
proposedEndeavor.subtitle: Architecting hallucination-free, enterprise-grade autonomous systems that translate complex R&D into high-impact industrial assets.
paragraphs: Large-scale enterprise software — particularly systems supporting payroll, HR, and critical workforce infrastructure for millions of users — creates an enormous surface area of operational complexity. Diagnosing production issues across hundreds of repositories, database schemas, and distributed log systems remains one of the most time-consuming bottlenecks in modern engineering organizations. I believe Agentic AI, deployed with strict guardrails and verifiable retrieval, can fundamentally transform how engineering teams resolve these issues at scale.

At ADP, I work as an Application Developer, where I conceived and led the architecture of an autonomous Generative AI debugging agent as an independent, proactive engineering initiative — successfully securing executive-level (VP) sponsorship for broader product integration. The agent integrates a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server with AST-based code navigation and secure database execution tools across 50+ enterprise repositories, paired with a static vector-embedded RAG knowledge base and strict prompt guardrails to eliminate hallucination — cutting Mean Time to Resolution (MTTR) for complex issues by 8x.

I am pursuing a Certificate in Agentic AI from Johns Hopkins University to deepen my expertise in autonomous agent design, multi-agent orchestration, and safety alignment. My broader research agenda — spanning voice-native dispatch agents, hierarchical multi-agent orchestration (JARVIS), and a granted utility patent in vision-based autonomous robotics — is dedicated to building reliable, deterministic AI systems that engineering organizations and critical infrastructure operators can adopt with confidence.

impactPoints.title: Enterprise-Scale Impact
impactPoints.description: Architecting AI-powered developer tooling and scalable Java Spring Boot backend services at ADP, integrated across 50+ enterprise repositories and database schemas.

impactPoints.title: AI Safety & Reliability
impactPoints.description: Designing AI agents with strict prompt-engineering guardrails, RAG retrieval, and deterministic orchestration protocols to eliminate hallucination in regulated, high-stakes environments.

impactPoints.title: Measurable Efficiency Gains
impactPoints.description: Achieved an 8x reduction in production debugging time (cutting 1-day issues to under 60 minutes) through an autonomous GenAI Debugger Agent built on MCP, RAG, and Splunk integration.

impactPoints.title: Research-Backed Expertise
impactPoints.description: Master's in Computer Science (Stevens Institute of Technology), Certificate in Agentic AI (Johns Hopkins, expected June 2026), and a granted utility patent in autonomous robotics (Patent No. 578389).

experience.description: Application Developer responsible for full-stack feature delivery, autonomous AI tooling, and technical leadership of a 3-developer squad on enterprise HCM platforms.
achievements: Conceived and led the architecture of an autonomous Generative AI debugging agent as an independent, proactive engineering initiative; successfully secured executive-level (VP) sponsorship for broader product integration.
Implemented a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server, integrating AST code navigation and secure database execution tools across 50+ enterprise repositories.
Deployed a static vector-embedded knowledge base (RAG pipeline) with strict prompt guardrails, reducing Mean Time to Resolution (MTTR) by 8x — cutting complex 1-day issues to under 60 minutes.
Engineered the agent to generate targeted Splunk queries and analyze distributed log outputs, enabling automated root-cause analysis at scale.
Demonstrate technical leadership by guiding a squad of 3 developers, conducting rigorous code reviews, and defining core Java Spring Boot framework architectures.

experience.description: Full-stack developer modernizing enterprise employee management systems and collaborating with database architects on high-volume transactional infrastructure.
achievements: Engineered a digital onboarding system to modernize employee management, utilizing React.js and Java Spring Boot to replace legacy manual processes.
Collaborated with database architects to design normalized schemas in Oracle, optimizing data retrieval speeds for high-volume user transactions.

experience.description: Selected for a competitive internship program at ADP's corporate headquarters, contributing to enterprise tooling and platform modernization initiatives.
achievements: Developed Python scripts to automate data fetching and insertion, reducing a 3-day manual process to minutes.
Migrated a legacy Product Catalog from spreadsheets to a web application using React, Node.js, and GraphQL, enhancing access security.

experience.description: Mobile development role at a fast-growing coding platform startup, driving user engagement through feature development and performance optimization.
achievements: Boosted Daily Active Users (DAU) by 10% by launching new UI/UX features and optimizing app performance.
Published a custom open-source 3D-touch gesture library, adopted within the production application.

experience.description: Early-career mobile development role contributing to enterprise financial management software.
achievements: Led a team to build the frontend of a Finance Management System using Java and Android.
Increased library modularity through code refactoring and performed comprehensive unit and API testing.

research.title: Autonomous Agentic AI Architectures for HVAC Dispatch Logistics
research.tagline: Voice-native, multi-agent dispatch with sub-800ms latency
highlights: Engineered a fully autonomous, voice-native dispatch agent utilizing Large Language Models (LLMs) orchestrated within a Multi-Agent System (MAS) framework.
Implemented advanced Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and function-calling capabilities to securely query CRMs and execute database scheduling mutations without human oversight.
Optimized Speech-to-Text (STT) and Text-to-Speech (TTS) pipelines to achieve sub-800ms latency while developing strict prompt-engineering guardrails to eliminate hallucination.

research.title: JARVIS: Hierarchical Multi-Agent Orchestration Architecture
research.tagline: Deterministic orchestration for autonomous software engineering workflows
highlights: Researched and developed deterministic orchestration protocols for autonomous software engineering workflows.
Architected a finite-state 'Brain' dispatcher to route specialized AI agents (Architect, Developer, QA) through an adversarial specialist loop.
Mitigated cascade failure by establishing sequential clearance protocols and structured, typed artifact schemas — providing a replicable framework for complex task execution.

research.title: Edge Computing & Vision-Based Autonomous Robot
research.tagline: Granted Utility Patent No. 578389 — Government of India
highlights: Engineered a dual-controller edge-computing architecture utilizing an Nvidia Jetson Nano for SpatialAI and an Arduino for mechanical kinematics.
Achieved autonomous unstructured navigation by implementing real-time object detection via an OAK-D stereo camera, YOLOv3, and continuous visual identification of ArUco markers.
Established the foundational expertise in real-time data processing and autonomous state management utilized in subsequent AI orchestration frameworks.
